name: Cozy Mystery
description: Light-hearted whodunit in a charming small town with an amateur sleuth

entities.name: The Sleuth
entities.description: Curious, observant local with a day job (baker/librarian/florist). Uses community connections to solve crimes police miss.

entities.name: The Police Contact
entities.description: Handsome but by-the-book detective who tolerates the sleuth. Romantic tension optional.

entities.name: The Victim
entities.description: Locally disliked figure with many enemies. Death shakes the community's peace.

entities.name: The Suspects (Ensemble)
entities.description: Quirky locals each with motive, means, and opportunity. Each has a secret unrelated to murder.

entities.name: Main Street Bakery
entities.description: Sleuth's business and unofficial investigation HQ. Smells of cinnamon and gossip.

entities.name: Town Police Station
entities.description: Small, understaffed, where the detective tries to maintain order amid amateur interference.

plot_threads.title: The Opening Murder
plot_threads.description: Beloved/hated local found dead during town festival

plot_threads.title: The Red Herring Romance
plot_threads.description: Sleuth suspects police contact's new partner

plot_threads.title: The Hidden Will
plot_threads.description: Victim's secret inheritance changes all motives

world_rules.rule: No graphic violence, sex, or profanity - murder happens off-page
Sleuth never in mortal danger - stakes are social/intellectual
Small town knows everything - secrets are currency

foreshadowing.content: Sleuth notices victim's missing heirloom brooch
Police contact mentions 'cold case from 20 years ago'
